RegionBehavior.dc-npc-patrols.dcDialogTree: Opens a branching conversation when a player enters the region.
RegionBehavior.dc-npc-patrols.dcAmbient: Whispers a random flavour line when a player enters the region.

enable_patrols.name: Enable NPC Patrols
enable_patrols.hint: Master toggle for all NPC patrol behavior.

movement_speed.name: Movement Speed
movement_speed.hint: Token animation speed in pixels per second.

stagger_delay.name: Stagger Delay
stagger_delay.hint: Milliseconds of delay between sequential NPC movements to avoid visual chaos.

proximity_radius.name: Default Proximity Radius
proximity_radius.hint: Default radius in grid squares for auto-generated proximity regions around NPCs.

ambient_cooldown.name: Ambient Dialog Cooldown
ambient_cooldown.hint: Seconds before an NPC repeats ambient dialog to the same player.

combat_freeze.name: Freeze Patrols in Combat
combat_freeze.hint: When enabled, all NPCs with combat_behavior 'freeze' stop moving during combat.

nav_resolution.name: Pathfinding Resolution
nav_resolution.hint: Subdivides each grid square into N×N navigation cells for finer wall avoidance. 1 = original behavior, 4 = recommended for tight corridors. Higher values improve pathfinding in narrow spaces but use more memory.

hub.title: NPC Patrol Hub
hub.no_npcs_on_scene: No NPC tokens on this scene.
hub.scene_hint: Settings that apply to the current scene or the whole world engine.
hub.bt_pause_hint: Pauses all behaviour tree ticks world-wide.
hub.path_debug_hint: Overlay last computed path on the canvas. Shortcut: Alt+Shift+P
hub.world_dialog_hint: Shared conversation trees — attach them to individual NPCs under Interactions.
hub.world_ambient_hint: Shared flavour line sets — attach them to individual NPCs under Interactions.
hub.world_bt_hint: Shared AI decision trees — assign them to individual NPCs under Behaviour.
hub.npc_hint: Behaviour trees decide what this NPC does. Movement paths below are waypoint data the BT can reference.
hub.movement_hint: Waypoint data for BT action_patrol nodes and the legacy patrol engine.
hub.create_dialog_tree: Create a dialog tree in World Content
hub.create_ambient_set: Create an ambient set in World Content

patrol_manager.title: NPC Patrol Manager
patrol_manager.tooltip: Manage NPC patrol paths and schedules

sheet.var_no_regions: Open a scene to pick regions

panel.title: NPC Patrol Manager
panel.no_paths: No patrol paths defined for this actor.
panel.no_waypoints: No waypoints in this path yet.
panel.select_actor: Select an NPC token or actor to manage their patrol paths.
panel.record_path_hint: Drag the token along the patrol route. CTRL+click for waypoints, right-click to undo.
panel.no_token_on_scene: This actor has no token on the current scene. Place one first.

dialog.title: Conversation
dialog.once_tooltip: This response is only shown once per player
dialog.delete_node_confirm: Delete this node? All references to it will be cleared.
dialog.node_id_exists: A node with this ID already exists.
dialog.cant_delete_last_node: Cannot delete the last node in a tree.
dialog.select_tree: Select or create a dialog tree to begin.

ambient.select_set: Select or create an ambient set to begin.

attachment.no_dialog: No dialog trees attached to this NPC.
attachment.no_ambient: No ambient sets attached to this NPC.
attachment.added: Attachment added and proximity region created.
attachment.removed: Attachment removed and proximity region deleted.
attachment.no_scene: No active scene — open a scene first.

dcDialogTree.label: DC Dialog Tree
dcDialogTree.hint: Opens a branching conversation when a player enters the region.

dcAmbient.label: DC Ambient Lines
dcAmbient.hint: Whispers a random flavour line when a player enters the region.

nodes.equip_item: Equips or unequips gear matched by partial item label.
nodes.use_item: Fires on_use boons for a usable inventory item (not attacks).
nodes.update_visible_tokens: Scans Foundry token vision and writes a list of visible tokens to the blackboard.
nodes.visible_tokens: Checks whether enough visible tokens match on the blackboard (optionally refreshes first).

editor.no_node_selected: Select a node in the structure panel to edit its properties.
editor.select_bt: Select or create a behaviour tree.
